home.subtitle: You're not alone. Let's find somewhere safe tonight.

needs.prompt: What would help most right now?

words.prompt: Anything you'd like us to know?
words.hint: Only if you want to. You don't need to share your name or address.
words.placeholder: e.g. me and my dog, nowhere safe tonight
words.retry: That didn't go through. Take your time and try again.

results.title: Places that can help
results.empty: Nothing's open right now — go back and try another kind of help, or check again in a little while.

arrival.title: What to expect when you arrive
arrival.point1: Walk in and let someone know you need help — no appointment needed.
arrival.point2: You don't need ID or paperwork to be welcomed.
arrival.point3: It's okay to bring your things. Ask if you're unsure about pets.
arrival.reassure: You belong here. The people inside are there to help, not to judge.

location.title: Where are you right now?
location.subtitle: We use this only to find the closest help. Your exact spot is never saved.

error.denied: We couldn't use your device's location. You can set it yourself below.
error.unavailable: Location isn't available on this device. You can set it yourself below.
error.timeout: That took a while. Try again, or set your location yourself below.

location.pickOnMap: Tap my location on the map
location.picking: Tap your location on the map…
location.notFound: We couldn't find that. Try a city or a nearby street.
